creator: thmu7@freenet.de
text:
There's no need for the old boost version.
gource 0.51 compiles with boost 1.87 (with the patch), and works on my system.
gource 0.55 compiles with boost 1.87 (without need for the patch), but bombs out on start on my system.

I'll keep a local copy of gource 0.51 around in case you're going 
to update the gource port.
